SOMETHING BIG IS COMING

CLAIM YOUR FREE NFL RIVALS BLUEPRINT MINT NOW

In anticipation of what will soon be announced, we are offering an extremely limited supply of NFL Rivals Blueprint mints - FREE.

Blueprints minted will be entirely random, provably fair, and span across the entire available blueprint collection. Your mint can range anywhere from RARE scaling all the way up to LEGENDARY.

The hype is real. Your blueprint awaits.

A glimpse at some of mintable blueprint results - the possibilities are endless...
